---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem or Use Case
What problem does this feature solve? Why do you need this?

**Example scenario**:
> "As a researcher studying [topic], I need [feature] so that I can [benefit]."

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

### Example
```
[Provide an example of how this would be used]
```

## Alternatives Considered
Are there other ways to achieve the same goal?

## Additional Context
- Are there similar features in other tools?
- Would this benefit other researchers?
- Any mockups, diagrams, or examples?

## Implementation Ideas (Optional)
If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented, share them here.

## Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - blocks my work
- [ ] High - would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor improvement
